name: GitHub CI Status → Slack Failure Alert
description: Polls GitHub's commit status API for a repository, validates that the CI is passing, and alerts a Slack channel immediately when a failure is detected.

config.TEXT: CI failure detected on main branch

required_secrets.description: GitHub PAT with repo:read scope for private repositories
Slack bot token with chat:write scope

replacements.config_delta: Replace CHANNEL+TEXT with TO (on-call email), SUBJECT (e.g. 'CI Failure on main'), BODY. Required secret: google/gmail_oauth_token instead of slack/bot_token.
Replace CHANNEL+BOT_TOKEN with TOPIC (e.g. 'ci.failures'). Downstream systems (PagerDuty forwarder, ops dashboards) subscribe to the NATS subject. No notification credentials stored in this module.
Replace CHANNEL+BOT_TOKEN with WEBHOOK_URL_SECRET='teams/webhook_url'. Set TITLE='CI Failure Detected' and COLOR='#D13438'. Required secret: teams/webhook_url instead of slack/bot_token.

Replace Slack config with INTEGRATION_KEY_SECRET='pagerduty/integration_key', SUMMARY='CI failure on main branch', SEVERITY='error', ACTION='trigger'. Set DEDUP_KEY='ci-main-failure' to prevent duplicate incidents. Required secret: pagerduty/integration_key instead of slack/bot_token.
